title: IssuerProfileDetails
description: Information about an Issuer as available on the server.

clientId.description: Unique Issuer identifier from the Mastercard Developers.

customerId.description: Unique Issuer identifier assigned by Mastercard which remains the same across all Mastercard systems.

supportedAccountRange.description: Comma separated account range must be between 4 and 8 supported by an Issuer.

status.description: Status of an Issuer on the server. Possible values are Active and Suspended.

countryCode.description: DE 19 (Acquiring Institution Country Code) is the code of the country where the acquiring institution is located.

termsAndConditionURL.description: Terms and conditions URL for the given user.

optOutURL.description: OPT out URL for the given user.
